productDisplayName: ADIDAS Women Court Switch White Sports Shoes
description: An aggressive tennis shoe designed to offer stability, grip and support on various courts, the adidas Court Switch is crafted in a dynamic style to keep your feet in the correct position always. Created using tough material and packed with features, it can bear heavy duty wear and tear with ease.UpperSynthetic leather upper with strategically placed oberlays and perforations on the sides of the forefoot for breathable comfortHeavily meshed and padded tongue and collar for breathable comfortCentral lacing system for a snug, customised FitPadded sockliner for all-day comfort and shock absorptionMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionadiPRENE+ inserts in the forefoot for absolute shock absorptionOutsoleTPR outsole with herringbone grooves for absolute grip and tractionPivot point on the big toe mound for easy 180 degree movement of the footCurved midfoot for ergonomic comfort Shoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
